project: Meridian Leasing Company - Salesforce Sales Cloud Migration
documentReference: Meridian Leasing - Salesforce Sales Cloud Migration Design Document (May 2026)

migrationScope.notes: Lead, Account, Contact, Opportunity, CampaignMember, MLC Asset, and Product record counts are N (to be confirmed in final migration file set).

objects.keyNotes: Lightning page modified to include MLC Assets related list.
MLC Asset relationship setup. Activity history validated post-migration.
Historical opportunity records migrated if confirmed in final scope.
Lead conversion mapping must be validated. Data imported if in final migration file set.
Campaign-level cost and asset relationships must be validated post-migration.
Used by MLC Asset Mass Creation Flow. Campaign history must be accurately preserved.
Part of 150,000 combined activity records. Synced via Einstein Activity Capture.
Part of 150,000 combined activity records. Synced via Einstein Activity Capture with Outlook calendar.
Custom field Product_Type__c added to reinforce bundle logic. Active and inactive records reviewed for migration.
Must be migrated in conjunction with Product2 records. Validate all active products have Standard Pricebook entries.

Primary custom object. Supports asset and shipping cost calculations at campaign level. Linked to Campaign, Contact, Account, CampaignMember, Product2, and Product Bundle. Created via Mass Creation Screen Flow.

additionalCustomObjects.keyNotes: Product Bundle custom object links parent bundle products to child component products. Required for MLC Asset calculations. Must be recreated and validated before MLC Asset migration.

integrations.name: Einstein Activity Capture
integrations.scope: Email sync, calendar sync, contact sync, activity visibility
integrations.notes: AppExchange setup required. Client-side app or license guidance provided. Testing with sample users prior to go-live.

automation.name: MLC Asset Mass Creation Flow
automation.description: Allows mass creation of MLC Asset records from a Campaign record page. Supports up to 5 MLC Asset/Product combinations per flow run across multiple selected contacts.
